name: Strength Relic
description: The Strength Relic is a common Eridian relic in Borderlands 2. It boosts melee damage, and some variants also improve the cooldown rate for certain melee override skills.
notes: Melee damage can increase by up to 37.8%. Melee override cooldown rate can improve by up to 30%. The cooldown bonus only applies to melee override skills with a cooldown timer: Maya's Scorn, Salvador's Fistful of Hurt, and Krieg's Hellfire Halitosis. It does not affect Zer0's Execute or Gaige's With Claws, as neither has a cooldown.

special.description: Increases melee damage. May also increase melee override cooldown rate.
